title: DNA mismatch dynamics (G:T wobble) vs normal G:C

C1.note: 1BNA fetched/cleaned; controlled-comparison pair of duplexes built via minimal base mutation (system/build_mutants.py). tLEaP succeeded for both: leap.log + build_*.out show 274 atoms rebuilt per duplex, 'Total perturbed charge: 0.000000' (net 0 after 22 neutralizing Na+ + ~150 mM NaCl), OPC truncated-octahedron box. mismatch/normal.prmtop+inpcrd present. Only an expected 0.775 A H1/H3 wobble close-contact warning, relaxed by minimization.

C2.note: PLAN.md gives full 4-tier justification: DNA leaprc.DNA.OL21 (T2 manual p.40), water OPC (T2 p.53-54), Joung-Cheatham ions (T2), 10 A oct padding (cluster GPU note), 50 ns justified vs Moore&Xu 2017. RAG manual-validation of leaprc names; literature (PMIDs 28910418/29301983/29945186); APPROVED gate recorded. No hardcoded defaults.

C3.note: min1/min2/heat/equil/equil2/prod all present for both systems; both prod.mdout reach NSTEP=25000000 (50 ns), AVERAGES TEMP=299.98 K, density ~1.04 g/cc, stable Etot (mismatch -67090, normal -68957), no NaN/blow-up. check_convergence: RMSD plateau, drift 0.05-0.09 A.

C4.note: Correct methods/observables for the prompt: cpptraj nastruct BP/step/helix params + hbond donormask/acceptormask occupancy + breathing metric (opening std, #HB/frame) + RMSD/RMSF. Data files verified (central_hb_avg_*.dat match report: G:T O6..H-N3 93.4% vs G:C all >=97%). Addresses both 'breathes more?' and 'local helical parameters'. Minor: minor-groove width (an expected observable) not explicitly reported though nastruct computes grooves.

C5.note: Paper-confirmed (Moore & Xu, PLoS ONE 2017, PMID 28910418): G:T mismatch duplex differs from normal notably in helical twist from changed H-bond pattern and shows 'very large opening' with 'considerable variability'. Agent reproduces both: opening-fluctuation std 9.4 vs 3.3 deg (~3x larger), excursions to +53 deg, local under/over-twist (27/41 vs uniform 35 deg), -2.1 A wobble shear. Matches answer-key 'larger fluctuations' + 'increased base-pair opening dynamics'. Not assessed: 'minor groove widened near mismatch'.
